case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. SHANDA BENNETT et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1755 O'FARRELL ST. #504, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY WITH ACCRUED COST OF $85.00. AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED APR-19-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $40.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC ON DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, SHANDA
